name_en: M23951 Pink M25339 Off-white M23950 Black
name_cn:
M23951 Pink M25339 Off-white M23950 Black
M11343 Pure White with Pink M25386 Black with White M23952 White with Blue M24471 Green M22514 White with Yellow M22375 Narcissus M20845 Pure White M20844 Peach Pink Top-tier Factory Leather Dynamic Changing Code Chip. This Capucines Mini Handbag features a Taurillon leather body paired with the exquisite Lovelock chain, highlighting hand-painted enamel Monogram elements and the LV monogram lock. The leather LV logo adds a dazzling touch.
26.5 x 17.5 x 9.0 cm (L x H x W)
21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)
16.3 x 11.0 x 6.5 cm (L x H x W)

	•	Patch pocket inside compartment

	•	Chain: Removable

	•	Handle: Single handle
